{{Infobox character
| name = Nine
| appears_in = Elder Empire
| introduced = [[Of Dawn and Darkness (novel)|Of Dawn and Darkness]]
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Nine is a navigator who travels aboard the [[Aion]]. He is characterized by his braided hair, one eye, and a scarred back. In combat or magical displays, he utilizes a hammer and possesses the ability to manipulate shadows, which he can lash out from his palm toward flames. He is associated with a companion named [[Eight]] and has been identified as a [[Champion]], an individual who attracts intense scrutiny from the [[Intent]]. During his duties, he assists with the preparation for sailing and shares responsibilities with [[Eight]] regarding potential encounters with sea serpents.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Nine is a weathered, sun-tanned man characterized by dark hair styled in small braids and a leather eyepatch covering his right eye. During this journey, he and [[Eight]] travel without using their true names, though both men wear shirts adorned with a gold crest. A man with a scarred back, Nine was eventually laid upon a bunk inside the cabin.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Nine]] is a sun-tanned, weathered man with dark hair in tiny braids and a leather eyepatch over his right eye.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c5">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Nine]] and [[Eight]] do not use their real names on this trip.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Nine]] and [[Eight]] wear a gold crest on their shirts.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Nine]] is a one-eyed man with a scarred back.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c7">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Nine]] was laid on a bunk inside the cabin.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c7" />}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|“We’re not supposed to use our real names on this trip.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c5" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
